title: tanarius sumatranus
intro: Tanarius sumatranus, also known as Tanacetum sumatranum, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family native to Sumatra, Indonesia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tanarius sumatranus include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and alleviation of pain. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or oil, and is also used in aromatherapy and as a natural insect repellent.
